sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Titan Machinery Inc. (NASDAQ:TITN) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Titan Machinery Inc. (NASDAQ: TITN) reported Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings, missing expectations with an EPS of $-1.58785 against an anticipated $-0.95. The company successfully reduced inventory by over $200 million for the full fiscal year, exceeding its targets, and expects continued inventory optimization in fiscal 2027. Despite challenging market conditions, particularly in domestic agriculture, Titan Machinery is optimistic about long-term fundamentals and aims to leverage its improved inventory position and customer care initiatives for future growth.

feed.title: Tejon Ranch Co. (NYSE:TRC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Tejon Ranch Co. (NYSE: TRC) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, stating revenue growth for the year driven by commercial real estate and a strong farming season, with record pistachio yields. Despite a net income decrease due to one-time proxy defense costs, the company highlighted improved operating performance and strategic initiatives to enhance shareholder value and governance. Key discussions included progress on master-planned communities, cost savings, and plans for an Investor Day at the Ranch.

feed.title: Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. (TNYA) Reports Q4 EPS of (12c), In Line with Consensus
feed.summary: Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:TNYA) reported Q4 EPS of (12c), matching the consensus estimate. CEO Faraz Ali highlighted clinical progress in 2025 and anticipates further updates in the first half of 2026 for its gene therapy programs TN-201 and TN-401. The company also presented positive preclinical data for its HDAC6 inhibitor, TN-301, showing improvements in Duchenne muscular dystrophy models.

feed.title: Genuine Parts executive vice president Naveen Krishna to resign in April
feed.summary: Naveen Krishna, Executive Vice President and Chief Information and Digital Officer of Genuine Parts Company, will resign effective April 1, 2026, to pursue other opportunities. He will remain with the company until May 5, 2026, for a transition period, after which his responsibilities will be reallocated. This announcement follows recent news of the company’s lower-than-expected fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and a dip in its stock price.

feed.title: Ecolab to Acquire CoolIT Systems, a Global Leader in Advanced Liquid Cooling for Next-Gen AI Data Centers
feed.summary: Ecolab (NYSE: ECL) has announced its definitive agreement to acquire CoolIT Systems, a leader in liquid cooling technology for AI data centers, for approximately $4.75 billion in cash. This acquisition is expected to significantly boost Ecolab's Global High-Tech growth engine and accelerate its organic sales growth, positioning it as a comprehensive cooling solutions provider for the rapidly expanding AI data center market. The deal, which enhances Ecolab's cooling-as-a-service offering, is anticipated to close in Q3 2026, subject to regulatory approvals.

feed.title: The Metals Company Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year
feed.summary: The Metals Company (TMC) has announced it will host a conference call on Friday, March 27, 2026, to provide a corporate update, including fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The company is a developer of lower-impact critical metals from seafloor polymetallic nodules, aiming to supply metals for various industries with net positive environmental impacts. This announcement follows recent developments regarding their deep-seabed mining applications.

feed.title: The Metals Company sets March 27 webcast on 2025 results, updates
feed.summary: The Metals Company (Nasdaq: TMC) announced it will host a conference call on Friday, March 27, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results and recent corporate developments. The event will be a virtual webcast with slides and an audio dial-in, with replays available on the company's investor relations website. TMC, a developer of lower-impact critical metals from seafloor nodules, aims to supply metals for energy, defense, manufacturing, and infrastructure while advancing recycling and traceability.

feed.title: Euromoney Private Bank Awards Recognize Fifth Third Private Bank for Second Year
feed.summary: Fifth Third Private Bank has been recognized by Euromoney as "United States' Best for Client Service" in its 2026 Private Bank Awards, marking the second consecutive year of recognition. This award highlights the bank's commitment to exceptional service, personalized insight, and dedication to its high net worth clients. The rigorous assessment process by industry experts and Euromoney's research team underscores the significance of this honor.

feed.title: Goldman CEO Says Deal Comeback Set to Help Firm Exceed Targets
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon believes that a resurgence in deal-making, coupled with growth in wealth management and alternatives, will enable the firm to surpass its return targets. He noted a recent shift in the regulatory environment, encouraging boards and CEOs to pursue strategic transactions more proactively, boosting confidence in executing such deals. Solomon shared these insights in a recent shareholder letter.

feed.title: US Premarket Movers: FedEx, Planet Labs, Super Micro, York Space
feed.summary: US stock futures are down, with the S&P 500 Index futures falling 0.5%. This movement comes as Iran continues attacks on Gulf Arab states despite Israel's indication to cease targeting Iran's energy infrastructure. Key companies like FedEx, Planet Labs, Super Micro, and York Space are identified as significant movers in the premarket.

feed.title: Twin Disc Inc Aktie: Q2 2026 Earnings Miss Sparks Concerns Over Marine and Industrial Demand
feed.summary: Twin Disc Inc reported Q2 2026 earnings per share of $0.04, significantly missing analyst consensus of $0.21, raising concerns about demand in its core marine and industrial markets. The company, a manufacturer of power transmission products, faces challenges from softening demand in recreational boating and industrial slowdowns, leading analysts to rate the stock a 'Hold' despite potential backlog in defense and energy sectors. This performance highlights broader headwinds for U.S. small-cap industrials, with implications for DACH investors monitoring global trade flows and sector recovery.
